subcodes.first_line: O ye twin verdant twigs of the Sacred Tree! Your missive hath been received, and the news of the completion of the Exalted House and the conclusion of the accounts
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو قضیب رطیب سدره مبارکه نامه شما رسید و از اتمام بیت مکرم و انتهای حساب
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @eulogies; reminiscences, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @rejection, opposition and persecution
